# EV001: IJSR Reliable Research Journal - IJSR for Academic Papers

Year: unknown

URL: https://duckduckgo.com/y.js?ad_domain=ijsr.net&ad_provider=bingv7aa&ad_type=txad&click_metadata=u8bNmpQGTrxem7YRoo%2DKs7eRs8codi1spL984QjVJ5i_2HslUXvNXJAGL5ExZVAMzX444tV4u_9XYH%2DNWqVruaw2IWJPrHXprgAVpRzPUW6t6lH6LhWSB0S_d3zf6u5Z0q0%2DBNyujDcp5czWOLg0kIO4GQqs4ra3h7iNy5AuOXY.iSYgS9Pa6Ck3pzYyacK1%2Dg&rut=e229e6ed2c61b273fc71300c80ba1a9a00953894953d318e8eedc2018e72b7de&u3=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.bing.com%2Faclick%3Fld%3De8KZb2N4hi16%2Dy9Dk7JqICIzVUCUyAngVIknbnmf6rSky8rx03Kk%2DgsYGKsSQSnwINxeT%2DLZRkcf2f85lX%2DNaa4VruC1f3KzAwCmurWqENYRQuNsiYvh4p5YsD%2D%2DVJK2SF9xFMM09Gry6nmoNfYrGAVP%2DUdJy1K5Nnb7OXoRxwH26Pbpn__SsilW4Mx9MN1%2DhfiOpWyPt55p7M_1SPjnPiRYYfMJk%26u%%26rlid%3D146969dfa3fc17eea17903c1ce26b04a&vqd=4-24749163984490697220981885271516146101&iurl=%7B1%7DIG%3DE557365648C94961A5DEA8888C77023E%26CID%3D3F57061AB728691A02731176B6D068EC%26ID%3DDevEx%2C5039.1

## Core Claim

The paper claims to provide a platform for easy and global publishing of academic research, positioning itself as a significant player in the academic publishing landscape.

## Method Or Focus

- Content aggregation and curation
- Global publishing platform development
- User-friendly submission interface design

## Limitations To Track

- The abstract does not specify any peer-review process or quality control mechanisms.
- No information is provided on the journal's impact factor, indexing, or academic credibility.

## Possible Gap

The paper reveals a gap in the transparency of the journal's academic rigor and peer-review standards, leaving open questions about the quality and validity of the published research.
